short: Your logo churn looks fine at 3.2%, but your gross MRR churn is 8.5% – a 2.6× gap that silently devours runway. Track the dollar loss, not just the headcount. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/saas-churn-rate-formula
title: The SaaS Churn Rate Formula: 3 Calculations That Expose Your Real Runway Risk
